heading: Today
text: Some morning sun, then clouds returning, with a rising chance of snow in the Adirondacks into southern VT and the Berkshires late this afternoon.  Highs in the 30s to low 40s.  Light winds, becoming south near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph west of the Green Mountains.

heading: Tonight
text: Occasional periods of snow.  Accumulations 1 to 3 inches in the valleys, 2 to 5 inches over the higher terrain.  Lows in the 20s.  Winds south 10 to 15 mph, becoming southwest late.

heading: Saturday
text: Some breaks of morning sun south.  Snow in the north and mountains tapering to snow showers, with an additional 1 to 3 inches over the higher terrain.  Highs in the 30s to low 40s.  Southwest winds near 10 mph, becoming northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph.
